notes: All 29 node proposals are clean creates against a graph containing only Brain system starter pages. No merge collisions exist. Merge decisions are sound.
All 34 edge proposals (plus the noted ent-028 → ent-002 gap) are grounded in direct evidence. No edges are inferred beyond what the source material supports.

Identity, values, positioning, and inferred entities are internally consistent. The design-engineering compression concept correctly serves as the organizing principle connecting stances, playbook, operating model, and career history.

The open_inquiries items intentionally not entityized (how-should-example-forecast-lab-evolve, where-is-the-next-frontier-for-example-studio-engagements) are correctly preserved in owner attributes only. No overfitting.

Section headings in all update targets conform to the editable section schema for their respective page types (project, concept, playbook, stance, inquiry, note owner). No unknown section targets detected.

The Example Research Shell tool being kept as an attribute of ent-001 rather than a standalone node is correct — it is described as a research component of Example Forecast Lab, not an independent project.
Career break health context is appropriately scoped to life_priorities on the note owner page and not over-interpreted structurally.

Bundle is approved for materialization subject to operator review of the ent-028 → ent-002 edge gap flagged in warnings, and optional clarification of the Example Market and Example Care Journal studio-engagement attribution.
